name: Watershed Climate & ESG Data API
what_it_does: Watershed REST API for enterprise climate data management and ESG reporting platform. Enables AI agents to manage Scope 1, 2, and 3 greenhouse gas emissions data collection and calculation, handle carbon footprint data integration from financial, supply chain, and energy data sources, access emissions factor database and calculation engine for GHG Protocol-compliant measurement, retrieve TCFD, SEC climate disclosure, and GRI sustainability report data, manage supplier emissions data collection and engagement workflow, handle renewable energy and offset procurement data for net-zero strategy, access emissions reduction target setting and progress tracking, retrieve science-based target (SBTi) progress monitoring data, manage internal carbon pricing and shadow carbon program data, and integrate climate data with ERP, procurement, and ESG reporting platforms.
use_cases: Calculating Scope 3 emissions from supply chain sustainability agents
Preparing SEC climate disclosure data from ESG reporting agents
Tracking net-zero progress from sustainability strategy agents
Collecting supplier emissions data from procurement sustainability agents
not_for: Simple energy monitoring without corporate carbon accounting and GHG reporting
Consumer personal carbon tracking without enterprise ESG disclosure focus
Environmental compliance without corporate sustainability reporting context
best_when: An enterprise using Watershed wants AI agents to automate emissions data collection, GHG calculation, supplier engagement, ESG disclosure reporting, and climate strategy integration.
avoid_when: DATA ACCURACY: Carbon accounting requires accurate activity data — garbage-in-garbage-out for emissions calculations. Automated Scope 3 calculations from spend data have high uncertainty (±50-70%); use for directional insights, not precise regulatory disclosure without data verification. SEC climate disclosure requires attestation by management; automated data generation needs human review.

auth.notes: Watershed uses API key authentication. Per-organization API credentials. Documentation at watershed.com/docs/api. No native webhooks — polling-based data retrieval. Integration with financial systems, ERP, and supply chain data. GHG Protocol compliant calculation methodology. Science-based targets (SBTi) integration. Backed by Sequoia and Kleiner Perkins.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; organization size and emissions data complexity determine pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Founded 2019. Private ($100M+ funding, Series B). Enterprise climate and ESG platform market. Customers include Airbnb, Stripe, and Sweetgreen. GHG Protocol-based methodology. Focus on corporate net-zero strategy and disclosure. SEC climate disclosure module. Competes with Sphera, Persefoni, and Enablon for ESG platform market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: DATA ACCURACY: Emissions calculations are only as accurate as input activity data; automated data ingestion must include data validation and anomaly detection
Scope 3 uncertainty — spend-based Scope 3 calculations have ±50-70% uncertainty; communicate uncertainty in automated reporting; don't present as precise measurements
SEC disclosure materiality — SEC climate disclosure requires management attestation; automated data generation needs human review before regulatory submission
Emissions factor versioning — GHG emissions factors update annually (EPA, IPCC, IEA); verify calculation engine uses current year factors for accurate reporting
Supplier engagement — supplier emissions data collection via API has low response rates without managed engagement programs; combine API with supplier outreach workflows
Methodology documentation — GHG Protocol methodology documentation must accompany disclosures; ensure automated reports include methodology footnotes
agent_readiness.security_notes: ESG and climate data. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Corporate emissions and sustainability data.

security_score_components.security_notes: ESG carbon accounting. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US. Corporate emissions and climate data.
